query_description: Analyze query execution plans using EXPLAIN to identify optimization opportunities
business_context: Understand query performance to optimize slow data warehouse queries and reduce compute costs

expected_characteristics: Full table scan (sequential or large portion)

query_2_optimized.description: SELECT * FROM bootcamp_db.training.orders WHERE amount > 100 AND customer_id > 0
expected_characteristics: Lower or equal cost compared to Query 1

validation_rules: Both EXPLAIN statements must execute successfully
Query 2 must have additional WHERE conditions
Student must compare costs between the two plans
Student must identify which query is more optimized
Analysis should note scan type differences
Should explain why additional filters help or don't help
No syntax errors in either query

interpretation_guide.cost_metric: Higher cost = more compute resources required = slower execution

scan_types.sequential_scan: Reads all data blocks (unoptimized for large tables)

optimization_signals: Presence of partition pruning in plan
Lower cost estimate vs unoptimized version
Fewer rows processed in earlier stages

common_mistakes: Running EXPLAIN on same query twice (no comparison)
Misunderstanding that EXPLAIN doesn't execute query
Not identifying which query is more optimized
